hero.headline: Get off book,
hero.subhead: Drop in a script, pick your role, and rehearse with AI scene partners. Souffleur listens, prompts you when you stall, and tells you exactly which lines to drill.
hero.feature1: Upload a PDF — we extract cast, cues, directions
hero.feature2: AI scene partners with voices you cast
hero.feature3: Quiz Mode tests recall, not recognition

footer.tagline: souffleur.ai — know your lines, not just recognise them.

signIn.headline: Welcome
signIn.subhead: The prompter is ready when you are. Pick up exactly where you left off.
signIn.aside: Public-domain plays included — Hamlet, Chekhov, Ibsen. Bring your own PDFs anytime.

signUp.headline: Get
signUp.subhead: Import a script, cast your scene partners, and start a read-through in minutes.
signUp.aside: Free to start — no card, no credits. Your scripts stay yours and are never shared or redistributed.

library.title: Your library
library.subtitle: plays · practiced recently
library.dropHint: Drop a PDF anywhere to start a new play
library.processingHint: Parsing the PDF — you can leave this page.

empty.headline: Get
empty.subhead: Bring in a script, pick your role, and rehearse with AI scene partners.

account.title: Account
account.deleteSubtitle: Scripts and progress are erased. No copies are kept.
